member.name: T:Dreamine.Threading.Allocators.AutoCoreAllocator
member.summary: Allocates CPU cores for Dreamine worker threads using an automatic per-core capacity policy.

member.name: M:Dreamine.Threading.Allocators.AutoCoreAllocator.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Dreamine.Threading.Allocators.AutoCoreAllocator.#ctor(System.Int32)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:Dreamine.Threading.Interfaces.ICpuInfoProvider
member.summary: Provides CPU topology information for threading services.

member.name: M:Dreamine.Threading.Interfaces.ICpuInfoProvider.GetLogicalProcessorCount
member.summary: Gets the logical processor count.

member.name: M:Dreamine.Threading.Interfaces.ICpuInfoProvider.IsValidCoreIndex(System.Int32)
member.summary: Determines whether the specified CPU core index is valid.
member.returns: True if the core index is valid; otherwise false.

member.name: T:Dreamine.Threading.Interfaces.ICpuUsageProvider
member.summary: Defines a service that provides CPU usage information.

member.name: M:Dreamine.Threading.Interfaces.ICpuUsageProvider.GetTotalCpuUsagePercent
member.summary: Gets the total CPU usage percentage.

member.name: T:Dreamine.Threading.Interfaces.IDreamineThread
member.summary: Defines a Dreamine worker thread.

member.name: P:Dreamine.Threading.Interfaces.IDreamineThread.Name
member.summary: Gets the worker thread name.

member.name: P:Dreamine.Threading.Interfaces.IDreamineThread.Options
member.summary: Gets the worker thread options.

member.name: P:Dreamine.Threading.Interfaces.IDreamineThread.CoreAssignment
member.summary: Gets the CPU core assignment.

member.name: P:Dreamine.Threading.Interfaces.IDreamineThread.Status
member.summary: Gets the current worker thread status.

member.name: P:Dreamine.Threading.Interfaces.IDreamineThread.JobCount
member.summary: Gets the number of jobs assigned to this worker thread.

member.name: M:Dreamine.Threading.Interfaces.IDreamineThread.AddJob(Dreamine.Threading.Interfaces.IDreamineThreadJob)
member.summary: Adds a job to this worker thread.

member.name: M:Dreamine.Threading.Interfaces.IDreamineThread.Start
member.summary: Starts the worker thread.

member.name: M:Dreamine.Threading.Interfaces.IDreamineThread.Pause
member.summary: Pauses the worker thread.

member.name: M:Dreamine.Threading.Interfaces.IDreamineThread.Resume
member.summary: Resumes the worker thread.

member.name: M:Dreamine.Threading.Interfaces.IDreamineThread.Stop
member.summary: Stops the worker thread.

member.name: M:Dreamine.Threading.Interfaces.IDreamineThread.StopAsync
member.summary: Stops the worker thread without blocking the caller thread during the join wait.

member.name: M:Dreamine.Threading.Interfaces.IDreamineThread.GetInfo
member.summary: Gets a snapshot of the worker thread state.

member.name: T:Dreamine.Threading.Interfaces.IDreamineThreadJob
member.summary: Defines a job executed by a Dreamine worker thread.

member.name: P:Dreamine.Threading.Interfaces.IDreamineThreadJob.Name
member.summary: Gets the job name.

member.name: P:Dreamine.Threading.Interfaces.IDreamineThreadJob.Options
member.summary: Gets the job options.

member.name: P:Dreamine.Threading.Interfaces.IDreamineThreadJob.ExecuteCount
member.summary: Gets the number of executions.

member.name: P:Dreamine.Threading.Interfaces.IDreamineThreadJob.LastExecutedAt
member.summary: Gets the last executed time.

member.name: P:Dreamine.Threading.Interfaces.IDreamineThreadJob.LastException
member.summary: Gets the last exception.

member.name: M:Dreamine.Threading.Interfaces.IDreamineThreadJob.ShouldRun(System.DateTimeOffset)
member.summary: Determines whether this job should run at the specified time.
member.returns: True if the job should run; otherwise false.

member.name: M:Dreamine.Threading.Interfaces.IDreamineThreadJob.ExecuteAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Executes the job.

member.name: T:Dreamine.Threading.Interfaces.IDreamineThreadManager
member.summary: Defines a manager that creates and controls Dreamine worker threads and polling jobs.

member.name: M:Dreamine.Threading.Interfaces.IDreamineThreadManager.Register(Dreamine.Threading.Models.DreamineThreadOptions,System.Func{System.Threading.CancellationToken,System.Threading.Tasks.ValueTask})
member.summary: Registers a worker thread or an overflow polling job according to the specified options.

member.name: M:Dreamine.Threading.Interfaces.IDreamineThreadManager.Start(System.String)
member.summary: Starts the specified worker thread.
member.returns: if the worker thread was found and started; otherwise, .

member.name: M:Dreamine.Threading.Interfaces.IDreamineThreadManager.Stop(System.String)
member.summary: Stops the specified worker thread.
member.returns: if the worker thread was found and stopped; otherwise, .

member.name: M:Dreamine.Threading.Interfaces.IDreamineThreadManager.StopAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Stops the specified worker thread without blocking the caller thread during the join wait.
member.returns: True if the worker thread was found and stopped; otherwise false.

member.name: M:Dreamine.Threading.Interfaces.IDreamineThreadManager.Pause(System.String)
member.summary: Pauses the specified worker thread.
member.returns: if the worker thread was found and paused; otherwise, .

member.name: M:Dreamine.Threading.Interfaces.IDreamineThreadManager.Resume(System.String)
member.summary: Resumes the specified worker thread.
member.returns: if the worker thread was found and resumed; otherwise, .

member.name: M:Dreamine.Threading.Interfaces.IDreamineThreadManager.StartAll
member.summary: Starts all worker threads.

member.name: M:Dreamine.Threading.Interfaces.IDreamineThreadManager.StopAll
member.summary: Stops all worker threads.

member.name: M:Dreamine.Threading.Interfaces.IDreamineThreadManager.StopAllAsync
member.summary: Stops all worker threads without blocking the caller thread during join waits.

member.name: M:Dreamine.Threading.Interfaces.IDreamineThreadManager.PauseAll
member.summary: Pauses all worker threads.

member.name: M:Dreamine.Threading.Interfaces.IDreamineThreadManager.ResumeAll
member.summary: Resumes all worker threads.

member.name: M:Dreamine.Threading.Interfaces.IDreamineThreadManager.TryGetThread(System.String,Dreamine.Threading.Interfaces.IDreamineThread@)
member.summary: Tries to get the specified worker thread.
member.returns: if the worker thread was found; otherwise, .

member.name: M:Dreamine.Threading.Interfaces.IDreamineThreadManager.GetThreads
member.summary: Gets the registered worker threads.

member.name: M:Dreamine.Threading.Interfaces.IDreamineThreadManager.GetThreadInfos
member.summary: Gets snapshots for all registered worker threads.

member.name: T:Dreamine.Threading.Interfaces.IDreamineThreadScheduler
member.summary: Defines a scheduler that assigns polling jobs to worker threads.

member.name: M:Dreamine.Threading.Interfaces.IDreamineThreadScheduler.SelectWorker(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{Dreamine.Threading.Interfaces.IDreamineThread})
member.summary: Selects a worker thread for an overflow polling job.

member.name: T:Dreamine.Threading.Interfaces.IThreadAffinityService
member.summary: Defines a platform service that applies CPU affinity to the current thread.

member.name: M:Dreamine.Threading.Interfaces.IThreadAffinityService.ApplyToCurrentThread(System.Int32)
member.summary: Applies CPU affinity to the current thread.

member.name: M:Dreamine.Threading.Interfaces.IThreadAffinityService.ClearCurrentThreadAffinity
member.summary: Clears CPU affinity from the current thread when supported.

member.name: T:Dreamine.Threading.Interfaces.IThreadCoreAllocator
member.summary: Defines a service that assigns worker threads to CPU cores.

member.name: M:Dreamine.Threading.Interfaces.IThreadCoreAllocator.Allocate(Dreamine.Threading.Models.DreamineThreadOptions)
member.summary: Allocates a CPU core assignment for the specified thread options.

member.name: M:Dreamine.Threading.Interfaces.IThreadCoreAllocator.Release(Dreamine.Threading.Models.DreamineThreadCoreAssignment)
member.summary: Releases a previously allocated CPU core assignment.
member.param: The CPU core assignment to release.

member.name: T:Dreamine.Threading.Interfaces.IThreadCyclePolicy
member.summary: Defines a policy that determines the delay between worker thread cycles.

member.name: M:Dreamine.Threading.Interfaces.IThreadCyclePolicy.GetDelayMs(Dreamine.Threading.Models.DreamineThreadOptions,Dreamine.Threading.Models.DreamineThreadCoreAssignment,Dreamine.Threading.Models.DreamineThreadCycleContext)
member.summary: Gets the delay in milliseconds for the next worker cycle.

member.name: T:Dreamine.Threading.Interfaces.ITimerResolutionService
member.summary: Defines a platform service that controls timer resolution.

member.name: M:Dreamine.Threading.Interfaces.ITimerResolutionService.Begin
member.summary: Begins high precision timer resolution.

member.name: M:Dreamine.Threading.Interfaces.ITimerResolutionService.End
member.summary: Ends high precision timer resolution.

member.name: T:Dreamine.Threading.Models.DreamineThreadCoreAssignment
member.summary: Represents the CPU core assignment result for a Dreamine worker thread.

member.name: P:Dreamine.Threading.Models.DreamineThreadCoreAssignment.CoreIndex
member.summary: Gets the assigned CPU core index.

member.name: P:Dreamine.Threading.Models.DreamineThreadCoreAssignment.UseAffinity
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether CPU affinity should be applied.

member.name: P:Dreamine.Threading.Models.DreamineThreadCoreAssignment.IsOverflowPolling
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether this assignment represents an overflow polling job.

member.name: P:Dreamine.Threading.Models.DreamineThreadCoreAssignment.IsDedicatedWorker
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether this assignment has a dedicated worker thread.

member.name: M:Dreamine.Threading.Models.DreamineThreadCoreAssignment.#ctor(System.Nullable{System.Int32},System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: Whether CPU affinity should be applied.
Whether this assignment is for overflow polling.

member.name: M:Dreamine.Threading.Models.DreamineThreadCoreAssignment.None
member.summary: Creates an assignment without CPU affinity.

member.name: M:Dreamine.Threading.Models.DreamineThreadCoreAssignment.Dedicated(System.Int32,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Creates a dedicated CPU core assignment.
member.param: Whether CPU affinity should be applied.

member.name: M:Dreamine.Threading.Models.DreamineThreadCoreAssignment.Overflow
member.summary: Creates an overflow polling assignment.

member.name: T:Dreamine.Threading.Models.DreamineThreadCoreMode
member.summary: Defines how a Dreamine thread is assigned to CPU cores.

member.name: F:Dreamine.Threading.Models.DreamineThreadCoreMode.None
member.summary: No CPU affinity is applied.

member.name: F:Dreamine.Threading.Models.DreamineThreadCoreMode.Auto
member.summary: CPU core assignment is selected automatically.

member.name: F:Dreamine.Threading.Models.DreamineThreadCoreMode.Manual
member.summary: CPU core assignment is selected manually.

member.name: T:Dreamine.Threading.Models.DreamineThreadCycleContext
member.summary: Represents runtime context information for a Dreamine thread cycle.

member.name: P:Dreamine.Threading.Models.DreamineThreadCycleContext.ThreadName
member.summary: Gets the worker thread name.

member.name: P:Dreamine.Threading.Models.DreamineThreadCycleContext.CycleCount
member.summary: Gets the current cycle count.

member.name: P:Dreamine.Threading.Models.DreamineThreadCycleContext.JobCount
member.summary: Gets the number of jobs assigned to the worker.

member.name: P:Dreamine.Threading.Models.DreamineThreadCycleContext.CoreIndex
member.summary: Gets the assigned CPU core index.

member.name: P:Dreamine.Threading.Models.DreamineThreadCycleContext.IsOverflowPolling
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether this cycle is for overflow polling.

member.name: P:Dreamine.Threading.Models.DreamineThreadCycleContext.Timestamp
member.summary: Gets the current cycle timestamp.

member.name: M:Dreamine.Threading.Models.DreamineThreadCycleContext.#ctor(System.String,System.Int64,System.Int32,System.Nullable{System.Int32},System.Boolean,System.DateTimeOffset)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: Whether this cycle is for overflow polling.

member.name: T:Dreamine.Threading.Models.DreamineThreadInfo
member.summary: Represents a snapshot of a Dreamine worker thread state.

member.name: P:Dreamine.Threading.Models.DreamineThreadInfo.Name
member.summary: Gets the worker thread name.

member.name: P:Dreamine.Threading.Models.DreamineThreadInfo.Status
member.summary: Gets the worker thread status.

member.name: P:Dreamine.Threading.Models.DreamineThreadInfo.Priority
member.summary: Gets the worker thread priority.

member.name: P:Dreamine.Threading.Models.DreamineThreadInfo.IntervalMs
member.summary: Gets the worker thread interval in milliseconds.

member.name: P:Dreamine.Threading.Models.DreamineThreadInfo.CoreIndex
member.summary: Gets the assigned CPU core index.

member.name: P:Dreamine.Threading.Models.DreamineThreadInfo.UseAffinity
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether CPU affinity is enabled.

member.name: P:Dreamine.Threading.Models.DreamineThreadInfo.JobCount
member.summary: Gets the number of jobs assigned to the worker.

member.name: P:Dreamine.Threading.Models.DreamineThreadInfo.CycleCount
member.summary: Gets the number of completed cycles.

member.name: P:Dreamine.Threading.Models.DreamineThreadInfo.StartedAt
member.summary: Gets the last started time.

member.name: P:Dreamine.Threading.Models.DreamineThreadInfo.StoppedAt
member.summary: Gets the last stopped time.

member.name: P:Dreamine.Threading.Models.DreamineThreadInfo.LastErrorMessage
member.summary: Gets the last exception message.
Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:Dreamine.Threading.Models.DreamineThreadJobOptions
member.summary: Represents options used to create a Dreamine thread job.

member.name: P:Dreamine.Threading.Models.DreamineThreadJobOptions.Name
member.summary: Gets or sets the job name.

member.name: P:Dreamine.Threading.Models.DreamineThreadJobOptions.IntervalMs
member.summary: Gets or sets the job execution interval in milliseconds.

member.name: P:Dreamine.Threading.Models.DreamineThreadJobOptions.IsEnabled
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the job is enabled.

member.name: P:Dreamine.Threading.Models.DreamineThreadJobOptions.IsOverflowPolling
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the job is an overflow polling job.

member.name: M:Dreamine.Threading.Models.DreamineThreadJobOptions.Normalize
member.summary: Creates a normalized copy of the current options.

member.name: T:Dreamine.Threading.Models.DreamineThreadOptions
member.summary: Represents options used to create a Dreamine worker thread.

member.name: P:Dreamine.Threading.Models.DreamineThreadOptions.Name
member.summary: Gets or sets the worker thread name.

member.name: P:Dreamine.Threading.Models.DreamineThreadOptions.Priority
member.summary: Gets or sets the worker thread priority.

member.name: P:Dreamine.Threading.Models.DreamineThreadOptions.IntervalMs
member.summary: Gets or sets the base cycle interval in milliseconds.

member.name: P:Dreamine.Threading.Models.DreamineThreadOptions.CoreMode
member.summary: Gets or sets the CPU core assignment mode.

member.name: P:Dreamine.Threading.Models.DreamineThreadOptions.CoreIndex
member.summary: Gets or sets the manually assigned CPU core index.

member.name: P:Dreamine.Threading.Models.DreamineThreadOptions.AutoThreadsPerCore
member.summary: Gets or sets the maximum number of dedicated worker threads per CPU core in auto mode.

member.name: P:Dreamine.Threading.Models.DreamineThreadOptions.OverflowPollingIntervalMs
member.summary: Gets or sets the polling interval used when a job is assigned to overflow polling.

member.name: P:Dreamine.Threading.Models.DreamineThreadOptions.AutoStart
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the worker should start immediately after creation.

member.name: P:Dreamine.Threading.Models.DreamineThreadOptions.UseHighPrecisionTimer
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether high precision timer resolution is requested.

member.name: P:Dreamine.Threading.Models.DreamineThreadOptions.UseAdaptiveCpuDelay
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether adaptive CPU delay is enabled when the interval is zero.

member.name: P:Dreamine.Threading.Models.DreamineThreadOptions.YieldWhenIntervalIsZero
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the worker should yield when the interval is zero.

member.name: P:Dreamine.Threading.Models.DreamineThreadOptions.StopTimeout
member.summary: Gets or sets how long stop operations wait for the worker thread to exit.

member.name: M:Dreamine.Threading.Models.DreamineThreadOptions.Normalize
member.summary: Creates a normalized copy of the current options.

member.name: T:Dreamine.Threading.Models.DreamineThreadPriority
member.summary: Defines the priority level of a Dreamine thread.

member.name: F:Dreamine.Threading.Models.DreamineThreadPriority.Low
member.summary: Low priority for background or monitoring work.

member.name: F:Dreamine.Threading.Models.DreamineThreadPriority.Normal
member.summary: Normal priority for standard work.

member.name: F:Dreamine.Threading.Models.DreamineThreadPriority.High
member.summary: High priority for timing-sensitive work.

member.name: T:Dreamine.Threading.Models.DreamineThreadStatus
member.summary: Defines the lifecycle status of a Dreamine thread.

member.name: F:Dreamine.Threading.Models.DreamineThreadStatus.Created
member.summary: The thread has been created but not started.

member.name: F:Dreamine.Threading.Models.DreamineThreadStatus.Running
member.summary: The thread is running.

member.name: F:Dreamine.Threading.Models.DreamineThreadStatus.Paused
member.summary: The thread is paused.

member.name: F:Dreamine.Threading.Models.DreamineThreadStatus.Stopping
member.summary: The thread is stopping.

member.name: F:Dreamine.Threading.Models.DreamineThreadStatus.Stopped
member.summary: The thread has stopped.

member.name: F:Dreamine.Threading.Models.DreamineThreadStatus.Faulted
member.summary: The thread has failed due to an exception.

member.name: F:Dreamine.Threading.Models.DreamineThreadStatus.Disposed
member.summary: The thread has been disposed.

member.name: T:Dreamine.Threading.Options.DreamineThreadingOptions
member.summary: Provides configuration options for Dreamine threading registration.

member.name: P:Dreamine.Threading.Options.DreamineThreadingOptions.RegisterWindowsServices
member.summary: Gets or sets whether Windows-specific threading services are registered.

member.name: P:Dreamine.Threading.Options.DreamineThreadingOptions.UseAdaptiveCpuPolicy
member.summary: Gets or sets whether the adaptive CPU cycle policy is used.

member.name: P:Dreamine.Threading.Options.DreamineThreadingOptions.AllowOverride
member.summary: Gets or sets whether an existing registration can be overwritten.

member.name: T:Dreamine.Threading.Policies.AdaptiveCpuCyclePolicy
member.summary: Provides an adaptive cycle policy that increases delay based on process CPU usage.

member.name: M:Dreamine.Threading.Policies.AdaptiveCpuCyclePolicy.#ctor(Dreamine.Threading.Interfaces.ICpuUsageProvider)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:Dreamine.Threading.Policies.FixedIntervalCyclePolicy
member.summary: Provides a fixed interval cycle policy for Dreamine worker threads.

member.name: T:Dreamine.Threading.Policies.OverflowPollingPolicy
member.summary: Provides a polling interval policy for overflow jobs.

member.name: T:Dreamine.Threading.Registration.DreamineThreadingRegistration
member.summary: Provides registration helpers for Dreamine threading core services.

member.name: M:Dreamine.Threading.Registration.DreamineThreadingRegistration.Register(System.Action{Dreamine.Threading.Options.DreamineThreadingOptions})
member.summary: Registers Dreamine threading core services.

member.name: M:Dreamine.Threading.Registration.DreamineThreadingRegistration.Register(Dreamine.Threading.Options.DreamineThreadingOptions,Dreamine.Threading.Interfaces.ICpuUsageProvider)
member.summary: Registers Dreamine threading core services.
member.param: The optional CPU usage provider for adaptive cycle policy.

member.name: T:Dreamine.Threading.Services.DreamineThread
member.summary: Provides the default Dreamine worker thread implementation.
Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:Dreamine.Threading.Services.DreamineThreadJob
member.summary: Provides the default Dreamine thread job implementation.

member.name: M:Dreamine.Threading.Services.DreamineThreadJob.#ctor(Dreamine.Threading.Models.DreamineThreadJobOptions,System.Func{System.Threading.CancellationToken,System.Threading.Tasks.ValueTask})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:Dreamine.Threading.Services.DreamineThreadManager
member.summary: Provides the default Dreamine thread manager implementation.
Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Dreamine.Threading.Services.DreamineThreadManager.RegisterOverflowJob(Dreamine.Threading.Interfaces.IDreamineThreadJob)
member.summary: Routes an overflow polling job to an existing worker, or creates a fallback worker if none exists.
member.returns: The worker to start outside the lock when a new fallback worker was created; null when an existing worker absorbed the job.

member.name: T:Dreamine.Threading.Services.DreamineThreadScheduler
member.summary: Provides default scheduling for overflow polling jobs.
